curatorWarnings: CONTRACT TYPO: contract sc-6-5 says "node dist/cli.js mcp" but the actual entry per package.json bin is "node dist/cli/index.js mcp". Use the correct path.

BOBER_TEST_DETERMINISTIC env var is NOT yet implemented anywhere in the repo despite contract assumption. Generator must either: (a) implement guards at the LLM-spawn points before triggering them, OR (b) design scenario A so it does NOT trigger a real LLM spawn (e.g., use a no-op task or a fake projectPath that avoids the planner phase entirely).
